description_long: This is a large, two-story brick house with a dark gabled roof and multiple rooflines, featuring a prominent chimney on one side. The front facade includes a covered entryway, a large garage door, and several large rectangular windows, some with awnings. On one side, there is a glass-enclosed sunroom or extension, adjacent to a small tree and paved walkway. The rear of the house features a balcony above a set of wide glass doors, and additional large windows that provide ample natural light. The house sits on a rectangular paved base, suggesting a driveway and walkway area. The overall design is modern suburban with traditional elements, emphasizing spaciousness and functionality.
description: A spacious two-story brick house with a dark gabled roof, large windows, a garage, and a glass sunroom extension, set on a paved base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage door, large windows, and a covered entryway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the glass sunroom extension, tree, and the solid brick wall with minimal windows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a balcony, wide glass doors, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring the prominent chimney and a row of large windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large rectangular windows and some glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entryway with a single main door, steps, and an overhanging awning
